app.name: DarkenChat
app.privacy: Messages travel directly between devices. Nothing is stored on servers.
app.privacy_turn: Messages are end-to-end encrypted via a relay server. The relay cannot read your messages.
app.privacy_relay: Messages are routed through a server in this session. The server can technically read message content.

room.switch_warning: Leaving room {key} will clear all messages from your device. This cannot be undone.
room.nickname_hint: Click the dice button for a random nickname
room.drop_to_send: Release to send the file right away

system.room_ended: The session has been ended by the chairperson.
system.nickname_renamed: Nickname "{from}" was already taken — you joined as "{to}".
system.room_config_set: Chair set the AI hard turn cap to {limit}
system.room_config_unlimited: Chair removed the AI hard turn cap (unlimited)

file.too_large: File is too large. Maximum is {mb} MB.

voice.mic_denied: Microphone permission denied. Please allow microphone access in your browser settings.
voice.full: Voice chat is full ({max} participants max).

chair.end_confirm: End the session? All messages will be lost immediately.
chair.kicked_notice: You have been removed from the room.

conn.turn_tech: ICE: relay — DataChannel via TURN (E2E encrypted)
conn.relay_tech: WS relay — messages via signaling server (plaintext)
conn.reconnecting_tech: Signaling channel down — retrying with backoff
conn.disconnected_tech: Signaling channel down — still retrying; roster unreliable
conn.turn_toast: Your connection uses a relay server. Messages remain end-to-end encrypted.
conn.turn_toast_tech: TURN relay active. DTLS encryption intact; relay server cannot read content.
conn.relay_toast: Server relay is active. The server can see message content in this session.
conn.relay_toast_tech: WS relay mode: messages pass as plaintext JSON through the signaling server.
conn.relay_confirm_body:
Your direct connection failed. To keep chatting, messages will be routed through our server.

The server can technically read message content when relay is used. It is best if all devices are on the same Wi-Fi or local network.

Continue with server relay?
conn.relay_confirm_body_tech:
P2P DataChannel unavailable (likely CGNAT/symmetric NAT). WS relay fallback will forward messages as plaintext JSON through the signaling server. The server operator can inspect message content.

Recommendation: ensure all peers are on the same LAN or use a properly configured TURN server.
conn.turn_apply_hint: Changes apply when joining the next room.

error.connection_lost: Connection lost. Please refresh the page.
error.protocol_mismatch: Your client is out of date. Please refresh the page to update.

room_config.title: Room AI settings
room_config.ai_turn_limit_hint: 0 = unlimited. When reached, the AI is forced to leave.
room_config.chair_only: Only the chairperson can change this.
